sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى عَلَى تَقْدِيمِ مَقَاطِعِ فِيدْيُو مُفِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kreatori sadržaja rade na pružanju korisnih video snimaka.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators work on providing useful video clips.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُ الْمَلَايِينُ مِنَ النَّاسِ الْمُؤَثِّرِينَ لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى نَصَائِحَ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Milioni ljudi prate influensere kako bi dobili različite savjete.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of people follow influencers to get various advice.

sentences.arabic: يَهْتَمُّ هَؤُلَاءِ الْمُؤَثِّرُونَ بِتَصْوِيرِ حَيَاتِهِمُ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ بِشَكْلٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovi influenseri se brinu o snimanju svog svakodnevnog života na lijep način.
sentences.translationEn: These influencers care about filming their daily lives in a beautiful way.
